nodes.name: Tuna Pasta Salad — Classic Skillet
nodes.description: name: Tuna Pasta Salad — Classic Skillet | short_description: A quick skillet-style pasta salad with tuna, cucumber, cherry tomatoes, and olive oil. Protein-forward, with fresh veggies and healthy fat
nodes.text_for_embedding: Meal: Tuna Pasta Salad — Classic Skillet - name: Tuna Pasta Salad — Classic Skillet | short_description: A quick skillet-style pasta salad with tuna, cucumber, cherry tomatoes, and olive oil. Protein-forward, with fresh veggies and healthy fats for a simple, balanced meal. | meal_suggestion: Use whole-grain pasta for extra fiber, and if available add more vegetables (e.g., spinach, peppers) and a squeeze of lemon for brightness. Keep olive oil portions moderate to manage calories. | nutrition_note: Protein from tuna and olive oil provide healthy fats and satiety; pasta offers energy. Cucumber and cherry tomatoes add fiber and micronutrients. For more fiber, use whole-grain pasta; if sodium is a concern, rinse tuna or choose tuna packed in water.

nodes.name: Lentil Soup — Sesame Variation
nodes.description: name: Lentil Soup — Sesame Variation | short_description: Lentil soup with carrots, celery, and onion in broth, served with whole-grain bread; sesame variation optional. | meal_suggestion: Serve hot w
nodes.text_for_embedding: Meal: Lentil Soup — Sesame Variation - name: Lentil Soup — Sesame Variation | short_description: Lentil soup with carrots, celery, and onion in broth, served with whole-grain bread; sesame variation optional. | meal_suggestion: Serve hot with a slice of toasted whole-grain bread. Optional sesame garnish can be added for extra flavor and nutrients. | nutrition_note: Plant-based protein and fiber from lentils; vegetables provide vitamins/minerals; whole-grain bread adds fiber and complex carbs. Broth-based soup tends to be low in saturated fat, with sodium depending on the stock used. If sesame variation is included, it adds healthy fats and calcium.

nodes.name: Hummus Snack Plate — Berry Boost Twist
nodes.description: name: Hummus Snack Plate — Berry Boost Twist | short_description: A quick, balanced snack plate with protein from hummus and cheese, fiber from whole-wheat pita and fresh veggies (cucumber and cherry
nodes.text_for_embedding: Meal: Hummus Snack Plate — Berry Boost Twist - name: Hummus Snack Plate — Berry Boost Twist | short_description: A quick, balanced snack plate with protein from hummus and cheese, fiber from whole-wheat pita and fresh veggies (cucumber and cherry tomatoes). | meal_suggestion: Enjoy as a quick snack plate; to align with the Berry Boost Twist, add a handful of berries on the side. | nutrition_note: Balanced protein from hummus and cheese; fiber from whole-wheat pita and veggies; healthy fats from hummus. Berry Boost Twist not represented by the current ingredients; add berries for antioxidants if desired. Typical portions: 1–2 pita wedges, 2–3 tbsp hummus, 1 oz cheese, veggies to taste.
